page: Microsoft Azure DC64eds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the DCEDV6 family. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU core.

This instance includes 3780 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-throughput disk operations. It does not feature any graphics processing units, relying entirely on the dedicated Intel CPU cores for computational tasks. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the DC64eds_v6 provides a high density of dedicated compute cores paired with a balanced memory allocation and substantial local storage capacity. This resource profile is designed for workloads requiring significant local disk space and multi-core processing capabilities. Suitable workloads include relational databases, enterprise applications, data processing tasks, and general-purpose business workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation and local storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC64eds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the DCEDV6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance features 3780 GB of local storage and supports premium storage configurations, though it lacks integrated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile offers a qualitative balance of high-density dedicated compute resources and substantial local storage capacity. The DC64eds_v6 is structured for workloads such as database management, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks that require dedicated CPU performance and significant local disk space.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC64eds_v6 is an x86_64 server with 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 3780 GB of local storage, running on Hyper-V for database and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core x86_64 server featuring substantial local storage and a balanced memory-to-core ratio for enterprise workloads.
